title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE SULU HIGH SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF JOLO, PROVINCE OF SULU, TO DAYANG HADJI PIANDAO MEMORIAL HIGH SCHOOL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 2908 / 59 OG No. 46, 7877 (November 18, 1963)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3712, June 22, 1963 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE SULU HIGH SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF JOLO, PROVINCE OF SULU, TO DAYANG HADJI PIANDAO MEMORIAL HIGH SCHOOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Sulu High School in the Municipality of Jolo, Province of Sulu, is hereby changed to Dayang Hadji Piandao Memorial High School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 22, 1963.
